name: 3 Sisters
overview: In the situational comedy series, three completely different sisters with different interests, desires and aspirations - Sevinj, Khoshbakht and Saadat - have moved from the village to the city. Each of them has their own expectations from life. Sevinj is an experimentalist, Khoshbakht runs a confectionery shop, and Saadat intends to become an actress. The comical events that occur around the three sisters form the basis of the series.
